Section Title: SBI Comma Fund Direct Growth > Frequently asked questions
Content:
What is the current price / NAV of SBI Comma Fund?The current [NAV](https://www.smallcase.com/learn/nav-net-asset-value/?utm_source=tickertape&utm_medium=faq&utm_campaign=asset-pages) of SBI Comma Fund is ₹122.25, as of 10th April 2026. What are the returns of SBI Comma Fund?The SBI Comma Fund was launched on 4th January 2013. This mutual fund's past returns are as follows:
1 Year Returns: 26.03%
3 Year Returns: 21.43%
5 Year Returns: 15.10%
What are the top 5 sectoral holdings of SBI Comma Fund?The top sectors SBI Comma Fund has invested in are as follows:This data is as on 10th April 2026. Iron & Steel | 20.39%
Power Generation | 13.95%
Oil & Gas - Exploration & Production | 11.65%
Construction & Engineering | 10.29%
Oil & Gas - Refining & Marketing | 9.50%
What are the top 5 holdings of SBI Comma Fund?The top 5 holdings for SBI Comma Fund are as follows:This data is as on 10th April 2026.

What is the asset allocation of SBI Comma Fund?The asset allocation for SBI Comma Fund is as follows:This data is as on 10th April 2026. Equity | 94.06%
Cash & Equivalents | 4.61%
Treasury Bills | 1.37%
Futures & Options | -0.03%
What is the AUM of SBI Comma Fund?The [AUM (i.e. assets under management)](https://www.smallcase.com/learn/aum-asset-under-management/?utm_source=tickertape&utm_medium=faq&utm_campaign=asset-pages) of SBI Comma Fund is ₹938.81 Cr as of 10th April 2026. What is the expense ratio of SBI Comma Fund?The [expense ratio](https://www.smallcase.com/learn/what-is-expense-ratio/?utm_source=tickertape&utm_medium=faq&utm_campaign=asset-pages) of SBI Comma Fund Plan is 1.59 as of 10th April 2026.
